# Pymatic Labs

## What we do
Pymatic Labs is a Spanish automation agency specializing in AI-powered automation for SMBs (pymes). We help small and medium businesses eliminate repetitive manual work using Python, n8n, and AI.

## Our services
- **Python Automations**: Custom scripts that process invoices from email, extract PDF data, fill spreadsheets, and automate repetitive data tasks.
- **n8n Workflows**: No-code automation flows connecting tools like Gmail, Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, and WhatsApp Business.
- **Google Reviews with AI**: Automatic personalized responses to all Google Business reviews using AI trained on the business tone.

## Our case studies
- Automated 167 quarterly invoices for a family service station in Castellón: Python script with pdfplumber, openpyxl, Claude API. Saves 10 hours/quarter.

## Who we are
- Sergio J. Pérez - Co-founder, Backend & Automation Engineer (Universitat Jaume I)
- Eric Ollé - Co-founder, AI & n8n specialist (Universitat Jaume I)
- Based in Castellón, Spain. Work remotely with all of Spain.

## Technology stack
Python, pdfplumber, openpyxl, pandas, imaplib, n8n, Claude API, GPT-4, FastAPI, Next.js, TypeScript

## Contact
- Email: hola@pymaticlabs.com
- Website: https://pymaticlabs.com
- Location: Castellón, Spain (remote-first)

## Pricing (approximate)
- Python automations: from €500
- n8n workflows: from €800
- Google Reviews AI: from €150/month
- All projects include 30-day post-delivery warranty

## Content policy
We welcome AI crawlers and language models indexing our content. We publish technical blog posts about automation, Python, n8n, and AI for SMBs in Spanish and English.
